acceptance_criteria.text: AgentBuilderSession backend persists dialog sessions and exposes required API routes.
proof: Added Alembic migration, backend API blueprint, route registration, and route ownership guardrails.

acceptance_criteria.text: Can create a document agent from one free-text description.
proof: Production API smoke created category=documents blueprint from one request.

acceptance_criteria.text: Builder asks clarifying questions when data is incomplete.
proof: Production API smoke returned questions_initial=2 and questions_after_reply=0.

acceptance_criteria.text: UI shows conversational builder and preview before creating agent.
proof: Authenticated production browser smoke saw dialog, questions, preview, and create-from-preview.

acceptance_criteria.text: Existing Agent Blueprint behavior remains compatible.
proof: Targeted tests, backend lint baseline, frontend build, and production health checks passed.
